metadata.description: Personal portfolio management plugin for Lurii Finance: portfolio-advisor (memory-driven, multilingual), memory-init, memory-curator, categorization-curator, cash-update, source-manage + lurii-finance MCP.

plugins.name: lurii-cc
plugins.description: Personal portfolio management for Lurii Finance. Skills: portfolio-advisor (ranked quantitative review, memory-driven, multilingual, Cowork artifact), memory-init + memory-curator (workspace `memory/`), categorization-curator (type/category rules: dry-run, dedup, transfer linking), cash-update (per-currency manual cash with diff), source-manage (add/edit/rename/delete sources, schema-driven, cascade gated). Bundles lurii-finance MCP (pfm-mcp).
